item.title: I lost my best friend yesterday
item.description: I can’t sleep. My brother went to the hospital almost a month ago, said he was having chest pains and some other stuff. Long story short… there were problems with his heart and he had heart surgery yesterday. They repaired the valves and all was going great… until it was time for the heart to pump on its own and it couldn’t. He was my baby brother. My heart hurts so so much right now.
item.dc:creator: toxicXsquid

item.title: Random stuff from the internet
item.dc:creator: ObsessedWithAnimals

item.title: Wee!
item.dc:creator: fulcrims

item.title: Do you need someone to listen?
item.description:
Wholesome truths you needed to hear...
And now our invitation :) You don't need to go through anything alone. Some of us who did got together to be there for you, because we never want others to go through what we did. A safe and healthy community of peer support 3 years running now. If you need someone to listen, or a safe place to just be, you're welcome to join us on our Discord chat server, Need-To-Talk. Here's an invite link: https://discord.gg/4bMgkkH
item.dc:creator: ItessaractI

item.dc:creator: Imadethisaccounttopost

item.title: Met Someone Great
item.description: I have not been on any kind of date in over 10 years. A friend of mine set me up with a woman that she thought we would be good together. My friend said she was pretty, that is an understatement. When she walked in for our date, I said I really hope that is her, it was. Good grief is she beautiful. I am not sure what I have done but I must have done something right because she is still talking with me and we have had a couple more dates since then.
item.dc:creator: Crymerge

item.title: Nice.
item.description: Edit : Merci à toutes et à tous pour vos conseils et messages ! Thank you all for your kind messages, stories, advice, remarks and job offers! I stay positive and keep in mind your suggestions. Atm, I volunteer in an association where I help refugees find jobs but somehow I am too dumb / gêné to ask anything for myself.
item.dc:creator: mieldoranger

item.title: Netherlands proposes a nationwide policy to fire racist or discriminating cops
item.description: Rough translation: police organization will be more forcefull acting against discriminatory or racist behaviour of cops. A sanction will always follow (with losing their job as an option on the table). In the midst of all the law enforcement issues in the US, we in the Netherlands find the same issues, but have a political climate suited to (try and) adress this. Link: https://www.nu.nl/binnenland/6205238/politie-dreigt-met-ontslag-voor-discriminerende-agenten.html
item.dc:creator: theDutchhaveinvadedSwitzerland
